def positive_duplicated_cleanup_paths_instead_of_context_manager():
    rule_id = "duplicated_cleanup_paths_instead_of_context_manager"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag repeated cleanup logic that should be centralized with a context manager or helper."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
